Navigational Error 2 5 Navigator Obtainable by speaking with Navigator (during the Liquid Black Quest). You confronted the Navigator.
Nightmare Walker 2 6 Outfits, Nightmare Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Nightmare Outfits You do not fear nightmares, you travel in them - facing countless horrors and fighting the fate they're about to bring. Few believe the dark prophecies you bring back from those dreams, but those who do fight alongside you as Nightmare Knights.
Of Wolves and Bears 2 6 Outfits, Druid Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Druid Outfits. One with nature, one with wildlife. Raw and animalistic power, sharpened senses, howling on the highest cliffs and roaring in the thickest forests - that's you.
One Thousand and One 2 6 Outfits, Oriental Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Oriental Outfit. You feel at home under the hot desert sun with sand between your toes, and your favourite means of travel is a flying carpet. Also, you can probably do that head isolation dance move.
Out in the Snowstorm 2 4 Outfits, Norseman Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Norseman Outfits. Snow heaps and hailstorms can't keep you from where you want to go. You're perfectly equipped for any expedition into the perpetual ice and know how to keep your feet warm. If you're a woman, that's quite an accomplishment, too.
Peazzekeeper 2 6 Outfits, Wayfarer Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Wayfarer Outfits. You're a humble warrior who doesn't need wealth or specialised equipment for travelling and fighting. You feel at home in the northern lands of Zao and did your part in fighting its corruption.
Polisher 2 4 Flask of Rust Remover, Lucky Devil Obtainable by successfully polishing a combined total of 1000 Rusty Armors, Rusty Helmets, Rusty Legs, and Rusty Shields. To do that, you need to use about 1500 Flasks of Rust Remover. If you see a rusty item, you can't resist polishing it. There's always a little flask of rust remover in your inventory – who knows, there might be a golden armor beneath all that dirt!
Potion Addict 2 4 Potions. Obtainable by drinking 100,000 potions that regenerate mana, 100,000 potions that regenerate health or 100,000 potions that regenerate both mana and health points. Your local magic trader considers you one of his best customers - you usually buy large stocks of potions so you won't wake up in the middle of the night craving for more. Yet, you always seem to run out of them too fast. Cheers!
Ritualist 2 6 Outfits, Summoner Outfits, Mage Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of the Summoner Outfits on a male character or both addons of Mage Outfits on a female character. You could be the author of the magnum opus 'How to Summon the Ultimate Beast from the Infernal Depths, Volume I'. Or, if your mind and heart are pure, you rather summon beings to help others. Or maybe just a little cat to have someone to cuddle.
Ruthless 2 5 Pits of Inferno, The Ruthless Seven Obtainable by finishing The Pits of Inferno Quest. You've touched all thrones of the Ruthless Seven and absorbed some of their evil spirit. It may have changed you forever.
Scourge of Death 2 5 A Pirate's Death to Me, Ghost Captain Obtainable by finishing 50 journeys in A Pirate's Death to Me. You are a master of the nether sea and have traveled with the ghost captain so many times that you know his ship and the perils of the nether sea inside out. You laugh in the face of death and may return as a ghost pirate yourself in the afterlife!
Ship's Kobold 2 4 Travelling, Ship Obtainable by travelling by ship around 1250 times. You’ve probably never gotten seasick in your life — you love spending your free time on the ocean and covered quite a lot of miles with ships. Aren’t you glad you didn’t have to swim all that?
Skin-Deep 2 4 Skinning, Obsidian Knife Obtainable by successfully skinning 500 monsters. You always carry your obsidian knife with you and won't hesitate to use it. You've skinned countless little - and bigger - critters and yeah: they usually don't get any more beautiful on the inside. It's rather blood and gore and all that...
Skull and Bones 2 6 Outfits, Brotherhood Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Brotherhood of Bones Outfits. Wearing the insignia and dark robes of the Brotherhood of Bones you roam the lands spreading fear and pain, creating new soldiers for the necromantic army which is about to rise soon. Hail the Brotherhood.
Spolium Profundis 2 4 Outfits, Deepling Outfits Obtainable by getting the full Deepling Outfits. You travelled the depths of this very world. You entered the blackness of the deep sea to conquer the realm of the Deeplings. May this suit remind you of the strange beauty below.
Stomach Ulcer 2 4 Hive Obtainable through repeating Disrupt The Hives Digestion task 100 times You severely disrupted the digestion of the hive. The hive should for sure see a doctor. It seems you proved to be more than it can swallow.
Suppressor 2 4 Hive Obtainable through repeating Pore Stuffing task 100 times. A war is won by those who have the best supply of troops. The hive's troops have been dealt a significant blow by your actions. You interrupted the hive's replenishment of troops lastingly and severely.
Swashbuckler 2 6 Outfits, Pirate Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Pirate Outfits. Ye be a gentleman o' fortune, fightin' and carousin' on the high seas, out fer booty and lassies! Ye no be answerin' to no man or blasted monarchy and yer life ain't fer the lily-livered. Aye, matey!
Swift Death 2 6 Outfits, Assassin Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Assassin Outfits. Stealth kills and backstabbing are you specialty. Your numerous victims are usually unaware of their imminent death, which you bring to them silently and swiftly. Everything is permitted.
Top AVIN Agent 2 4 Secret Service Quest, AVIN, Uncle Obtainable by finishing the Secret Service Quest for the AVIN faction. You've proven yourself as a worthy member of the 'family' and successfully carried out numerous spy missions for your 'uncle' to support the Venorean traders and their goals.
Top CGB Agent 2 4 Secret Service Quest, CGB, Emma Obtainable by finishing the Secret Service Quest for the CGB faction. Girl power! Whether you're female or not, you've proven absolute loyalty and the willingness to put your life at stake for the girls brigade of Carlin.
Top TBI Agent 2 4 Secret Service Quest, TBI Obtainable by finishing the Secret Service Quest for the TBI faction. Conspiracies and open secrets are your daily bread. You've shown loyalty to the Thaian crown through your courage when facing enemies and completing spy missions. You're an excellent field agent of the TBI.
True Lightbearer 2 5 Lightbearer Event, Lucius, Magical Torch Obtainable by lighting every basin in the Lightbearer event. You're one of the most dedicated Lightbearers - without you, the demons would have torn the veil between the worlds for sure. You've lit each and every basin, travelling high and low, pushing back the otherworldly forces. Let there be light!
Turncoat 2 4 Yalahar, Palimuth, Yalahari Obtainable by completing mission 9 of In Service of Yalahar Quest and following some of Yalahari's and some of Palimuth's instructions. You served Yalahar - but you didn't seem so sure whom to believe on the way. Both Azerus and Palimuth had good reasons for their actions, and thus you followed your gut instinct in the end, even if you helped either of them. May Yalahar prosper!
Warlock (Achievement) 2 6 Outfits, Wizard Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Wizard Outfits. You're proficient in the darker ways of magic and are usually found sitting inside a circle of candles and skulls muttering unspeakable words. Don't carry things too far or the demons might come get you.
Warlord of Svargrond 2 5 Warlord Arena Obtainable by finishing the Barbarian Arena Quest in the Warlord difficulty. You sent the Obliverator into oblivion in the arena of Svargrond and defeated nine other dangerous enemies on the way. All hail the Warlord of Svargrond!
Way of the Shaman 2 6 Outfits, Shaman Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Shaman Outfits. Shaking your rattle and dancing around the fire to jungle drums sounds like something you like doing. Besides, dreadlocks are a convenient way to wear your hair - no combing required!
Wild Warrior (Achievement) 2 6 Outfits, Warrior Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Warrior Outfits. Valour is for weaklings - it doesn't matter how you win the battle, as long as you're victorious. Thick armor would just hinder your movements, thus you keep it light and rely on speed and skill instead of hiding in an uncomfortable shell.
Herbicide 3 8 Demon Oak, Hallowed Axe Obtainable by completing The Demon Oak Quest. You're one of the brave heroes to face and defeat the mysterious demon oak and all the critters it threw in your face. Wielding your blessed axe no tree dares stand in your way - demonic or not.
Lord Protector 3 8 Nightmare Knights Obtainable by getting the rank of Lord Protector of the Nightmare Knights faction in the Dreamer's Challenge Quest. You proved yourself - not only in your dreams - and possess a strong and spiritual mind. Your valorous fight against demons and the undead plague has granted you the highest and most respected rank among the Nightmare Knights.
Pwned a Lot of Fur 3 8 Killing in the Name of... Quest, Paw and Fur Society Obtainable by killing The Snapper, Hide, Deathbine, The Bloodtusk, Shardhead, Esmeralda, Fleshcrawler, Ribstride, The Bloodweb, Thul, The Old Widow, Flameborn, Sulphur Scuttler, The Many, The Noxious Spawn, Gorgo, Stonecracker, Leviathan, Kerberos and Ethershreck in the Killing in the Name of... Quest. You've faced and defeated a lot of the mighty bosses the Paw and Fur society sent you out to kill. All by yourself. What a hunt!
Pwned All Fur 3 8 Killing in the Name of... Quest, Paw and Fur Society Obtainable by killing all bosses in the Killing in the Name of... Quest. You've faced and defeated each of the mighty bosses the Paw and Fur society sent you out to kill. All by yourself. What a hunt!
Razing! 3 7 Vampire Lord Token, Storkus Obtainable by getting the rank of Razing! in the Vampire Hunter Quest. People with sharp canine teeth better beware of you, especially at nighttime, or they might find a stake between their ribs. You're a merciless vampire hunter and have gathered numerous tokens as proof.
Green Thumb 2 4 Flower Pot, Seeds Obtainable by growing 100 fully developed flowers in Flower Pots. Tip: you can reuse pots by letting the flower in it wither to then finally water it again. The flower will return to stage 2 and can then be grown to stage 3 again. If someone gives you seeds, you usually grow a beautiful plant from it within a few days. You like your house green and decorated with flowers. Probably you also talk to them.
True Dedication 2 5 Outfits Obtainable by getting full Demon Outfits. You conquered the demon challenge and prevailed... now show off your success in style!
Task Manager 1 2 Goblin Merchant Quest, Rafzan Obtainable by completing Goblin Merchant Quest tasks 500 times. Helping a poor, stupid goblin to feed his starving children and wifes feels good ... if you'd only get rid of the strange feeling that you're missing something.
Gravedigger (Achievement) 1 3 Omrabas, Drefia Obtained by finishing The Gravedigger of Drefia Quest. Assisting Omrabas' sick plan to resurrect made you dig your way through the blood-soaked halls of Drefia. Maybe better he failed!
Repenter (Achievement) 1 1 Repenters Obtained by doing all tasks of The Repenters Quest and then asking for a bonus. You cleansed your soul in serving the Repenter enclave and purified thine self in completing all tasks in a single day of labour.
Firewalker 2 4 Fire, Firewalker Boots This achievement can be gotten by walking 1,000,000 tiles on fire while wearing Firewalker Boots. Note that any type of fire field will work for this achievement (even player-made ones) as long as the fields inflict damage for the boots to block. Running barefoot across ember is not for you! You do it the elegant way. Yet, you're kind of drawn to fire and warm surroundings in general - you like it hot!
Cave Completionist 1 2 Cave Explorer Outfits, Spike Tasks Quest Obtain the Cave Explorer Outfits and both of its addons. You have helped the gnomes of the spike in securing the caves and explored enough of the lightles depths to earn you a complete cave explorers outfit. Well done!
Waverider 1 2 Swimming, Water (Tile), Walking Obtainable by swimming 100,000 tiles. NOTE: it is possible to gain this achievement in Rookgaard. One thing's for sure: You definitely love swimming. Hanging out on the beach with your friends, having ice cream and playing beach ball is splashingly good fun!
Luring Silence 1 2 Silencer, Roshamuul Obtained by finishing the mission Luring Silencers during the Roshamuul Quest. What a scientific discovery - they really DO communicate! Using their own communication habits against them, you lured a large pack of silencers away from the walls of Roshamuul.
Never Surrender 1 3 Sight of Surrender, Roshamuul Obtained by killing 100 Sights of Surrender. Note: you don't need to be the person dealing the most damage to one. Anyone participating in the fight will receive one point when it gets killed. You did not show any signs of surrender to any sight of... you get the picture. Even a hundred of them did not pose a threat to you.
Sleepwalking 1 1 Feversleep, Roshamuul Obtained by finishing the missions A Cup of Tea, Ancient Dreams and Waters of Life during the Roshamuul Quest. You know your way, in dream and waking. And how to make tea that transcends the boundaries of conscience.
Dream Wright 1 1 Shimmying Butterfly, Roshamuul Quest Obtainable by completing the Mend What's Broken task of the Roshamuul Quest 34 times (freeing 102 Shimmying Butterflies). You have mended many a broken dream and so, the dream of Roshamuul is safely being told over and over again.
Umbral Archer 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Bow Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Bow. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your bow into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Berserker 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Hammer Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Hammer. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your hammer into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Bladelord 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Slayer Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Slayer. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your slayer into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Brawler 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Mace Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Mace. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your mace into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Executioner 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Chopper Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Chopper. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your chopper into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Harbinger 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Spellbook Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Spellbook. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your spellbook into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Headsman 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Axe Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Axe. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your axe into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Marksman 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Master Crossbow Obtained by creating an Umbral Master Crossbow. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your crossbow into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Umbral Master 3 8 Umbral Creation, Umbral Weapons Obtained by creating all of the Master Umbral Weapons. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify all kinds of weapons into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world. Respect!
Ending the Horror 1 2 Retching Horror, Roshamuul Obtained by finishing the mission A Retched Beginning during the Roshamuul Quest. You have cleansed the lands of many retching horrors. You sure know how to end a bad dream: forcefully, that's how!
Dream Warden 2 5 Outfits, Dream Warden Outfits Obtained by getting the Dream Warden Outfits with both addons. It doesn't matter what noise you would hear... dream, nightmare, illusion - there is nothing you can't vanquish. You are a true Dream Warden.
Prison Break 3 8 Gaz'haragoth, Roshamuul Prison Obtained by helping to kill Gaz'haragoth. Gaz'haragoth... a day to remember! Your world accomplished something really big - and you have been part of it!
Umbral Swordsman 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Masterblade Obtained by creating an Umbral Masterblade. You managed to transform, improve and sacrify your blade into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Noblesse Obliterated 2 6 Prince Drazzak, Roshamuul Prison Obtainable by killing Prince Drazzak in the Roshamuul Prison. After a battle like this you know who your friends are.
Nevermending Story 1 3 Roshamuul Quest, Message in a Bottle Obtainable by fishing all 11 Messages in a Bottle out of the water during the Roshamuul Quest and then finding the first mate. You collected all of the mysterious bottle messages around the island of Roshamuul and located the remains of the first mate. Time will tell if his tale of mending an evil ring holds true.
Glooth Engineer 2 5 Outfits, Glooth Engineer Outfits Obtained by getting the Glooth Engineer Outfits with both addons. Though you might have averted a dire threat for Rathleton, this relative peace may only hold for a while. At least you've scavenged an outfit from some of the poor fellows that have fallen prey to death priest Shagron.
Rathleton Inhabitant 1 1 Rathleton Quest, Marvin Obtained by reaching the rank of Inhabitant in the Rathleton Quest. By having rendered numerous services to the city of Rathleton you have been promoted to the rank of Inhabitant.
Rathleton Citizen 1 1 Rathleton Quest, Marvin Obtained by reaching the rank of Citizen in the Rathleton Quest. By having rendered numerous services to the city of Rathleton you have been promoted to the rank of Citizen.
Elementary, My Dear 1 1 Oramond Quest, Dr Merlay, Pint of Glooth, Roswitha Obtainable by drinking a Pint of Glooth and accessing Dr Merlay's hideout during Dr Merlay's Misery Task in the Oramond Quest. Through the spirit of science and exploration, you have discovered how to enter the secret hideout of the renowned Dr Merlay.
Rathleton Commoner 1 1 Rathleton Quest, Marvin Obtained by reaching the rank of Commoner in the Rathleton Quest. By having rendered numerous services to the city of Rathleton you have been promoted to the rank of Commoner.
Combo Master 1 1 Oramond Quest Obtained by finishing at least 10 consecutive Combinatorics tasks perfectly in the Oramond Quest. You accomplished 10 or more consecutive chains in a row! That's killing at least 39 creatures in the correct order - now that's combinatorics!
Seasoned Adventurer 1 1 Level, Experience Achieve level 50. If you have already surpassed this level, just level up once and you should get it. Adventure is your middle name. You spent much time in dangerous lands and have seen things others only dream of. You know your way around in Tibia - you are a seasoned adventurer now. And your journey has only just begun!
Rathleton Squire 1 1 Rathleton Quest, Marvin Obtained by reaching the rank of Squire in the Rathleton Quest. By having rendered numerous services to the city of Rathleton you have been promoted to the rank of Squire.
The Professor's Nut 1 3 Jaccus Maxxen Obtained by opening the chest after completing the Hero of Rathleton Quest. He seriously stored away a wallnut? That was a nutty professor indeed.
Snake Charmer 1 1 Everhungry Altar, Fire-Feathered Sea Serpent Obtainable by completing the Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest. By restoring the Everhungry Altar, you charmed the Fire-Feathered Sea Serpent back into its fitful sleep, twenty miles beneath the sea.
Rumble in the Plant 2 4 Tremor Worm Obtained by defeating the Tremor Worm. You have defeated the tremor worm - and wonder what kind of fish you'd be able to catch with such a bait.
Robo Chop 2 4 Glooth Bomb Obtained by helping to defeat the Glooth Bomb. You have defeated the glooth bomb and chopped down a lot of metal monsters on your way.
Publicity 1 1 Zeronex Obtainable by delivering Airtight Cloths to Yeo, Nicholas, Barazbaz, Alaistar, Fayla and Christine after completing the first two parts of Glooth Factory Quest - The Gloud Ship. You are a man of the public. Or of good publicity at least. Through your efforts in advertising the airtight cloth, Zeronex might yet be redeemed - and Rathleton might yet see its first working Gloud Ship.
Plant vs. Minos 2 4 Moohtant Wallbreaker, Glooth Plant Obtained by helping to defeat the Moohtant Wallbreaker. You have defeated the wallbreaker and saved the glooth plant.
Mind the Step! 1 1 The Orb of Darkness Eternal, Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest, Guardian of the Deep Seas, Quara, Stone Snake Shrine, Mind Stone Received when obtaining The Orb of Darkness Eternal in Twenty Miles Beneath the Sea Quest. You've got a mind ready to draw strange conclusions that defy the laws of logic and sidestep reality. Or maybe it's just a lucky guess - or adventurous recklessness?
Lion's Den Explorer 1 1 Lion's Rock Obtained by completing the Lion's Rock Quest. You discovered the Lion's Rock, passed the tests to enter the inner sanctum and finally revealed the secrets of the buried temple. You literally put your head in the lion's mouth and survived.
Go with da Lava Flow 1 1 Jaccus Maxxen, Lava Obtained by completing the Into the Fire mission during the Hero of Rathleton Quest. You escaped the glowing hot lava death trap, Professor Maxxen has set for you - Captain Caveworm is indeed proud!
Wail of the Banshee 1 1 One-Eyed Joe, Crystal Gardens, The Cursed Crystal Quest Obtained by completing The Cursed Crystal Quest. You saw the Crystal Gardens with all their stunning beauty and survived the equally impressive monsters there. In the end you discovered a great evil and destroyed it with the help of a banshee who was not even aware of her support.
Nanny from Hell 1 3 Demon's Lullaby, Demon Infant, Demon Mother Obtainable by successfully taking care of a Demon Infant during the Demon's Lullaby event for 5 years. You have cheered up a bunch of demon babies and returned them to their mother. Don't bother the burn marks, don't bother the strains of grey hair, don't bother the nights you wake up screaming. It was worth it ... probably ... somehow.
Goldhunter 1 2 Mini World Changes, Bag with Stolen Gold, Bank Obtained by returning 5 Bags with Stolen Gold in total when the Bank Robbery Mini World Change is active. If it wasn't for you, several banks in Tibia would've gotten bankrupt by now. Keep on chasing bank robbers and no one will have to worry about the Tibian economy!
Little Ball of Wool 1 1 Reins, Black Sheep, Black Sheep (Mount) Obtained by taming a Black Sheep. You found a lost sheep and thus a steady source of black wool. But careful: don't get entangled.
Bearbaiting 1 1 Slingshot, Bear, War Bear Obtained by taming a Bear. Hunter's greeting! Your skillful use of the slingshot actually stunned a large bear. The creature is slightly dazed, but seems susceptible to your commands. Let's declare open season on all our foes!
Beneath the Sea 1 3 Foxtail, Manta Ray, Manta Ray (Mount) Obtained by taming a Manta Ray. Not really twenty thousand miles, but you had to dive a fair way beneath the sea to find your personal Manta Ray.
Blacknailed 1 1 The Gravedigger of Drefia Quest, Nail Case, Gravedigger, The Hellgrip Obtained by taming a Gravedigger. Well, you can rest your nailcase now. This gravedigger's fingernails are nice and clean. Though after the next hellride, you might not want to let it hand any food to you.
Cartography 101 1 2 Adventurers' Guild, Cartography 101 Quest Obtained by finishing the Cartography 101 Quest. You succeeded in finding and charting several previously unexplored landmarks and locations for the Adventurer's Guild, you probably never need to ask anyone for the way - do you?
Chequered Teddy 1 1 Bamboo Leaves, Music Box, Panda, Tamed Panda Obtained by taming a Panda. Don't let its fluffy appearance deceive you. The panda is a creature of the wild. It will take you to the most distant regions of Tibia, always in hopes of a little bamboo to nibble on or to check on a possible mate.
Dragon Mimicry 1 2 Decorative Ribbon, Music Box, Dragonling, Dragonling (Mount) Obtained by taming a Dragonling. It's not really a dragon, but rather a kind of chimera. Nonetheless a decent mount to impress any passer-by.
Fabled Construction 1 3 Hero of Rathleton Quest, Glooth Glider Obtained by building a Glooth Glider. Finding all the pieces to this complicated vehicle was one kind of a challenge. However, what you built in the end is rather a fabled than a feeble construction.
Fata Morgana 1 2 Fist on a Stick, Dromedary, Dromedary (Mount) Obtained by taming a Dromedary. There are many delusions and phantasms in the desert. You saw a false oasis with fruit-bearing palm trees. Instead of water and refreshment, however, you found a dromedary in the end. What a useful Fata Morgana!
Fried Shrimp 1 2 Giant Shrimp, Crustacea Gigantica, Titanica Obtained by taming a Crustacea Gigantica. This must be underwater love - this enormous crustacean now does thy bidding. Or maybe it's just in it for a little more of that shrimp barbecue, as that's a little hard to come by in the sea.
Friend of Elves 1 1 Golden Fir Cone, Music Box, White Deer, Enraged White Deer, Kingly Deer Obtained by taming an Enraged White Deer. Kingly deer mostly prefer elves as friends and familiars. This one, however, decided to favour you as a confidant and rider. Well done!
Gear Up 1 3 Control Unit, Walker, Walker (Mount) Obtained by taming a Walker. Installing that control unit was a no-brainer. Now you're in control to make it walk this way or that, or to change tack at any moment if required. Your faithful walker mount obeys your every command.
Golden Sands 1 3 Scorpion Sceptre, Sandstone Scorpion, King Scorpion Obtained by taming a Sandstone Scorpion. Counting ten thousand grains of sand could not have been harder than gaining this impressive mount.
Icy Glare 1 1 Melting Horn, Half-Frozen Ursagrodon, Ursagrodon Obtained by taming a Half-Frozen Ursagrodon. Here's looking at you, kid. This ancient creature seems to size you up with its brilliant eyes and barely tolerates you riding it. Maybe it thinks you're the defrosted snack, after all?
Knock on Wood 1 3 Tin Key, Tin Lizzard (Object), Tin Lizzard Obtained by taming a Tin Lizzard (Object). It's a wound-up wooden lizard! Well, stranger things have happened, or so you're told. Just hop on and let this wood-and-tin contraption take you anywhere you want to wind down a bit. And hope you don't get hit by lightning underway.
Lion King 1 1 Lion's Rock Quest, The Lion's Heart, Noble Lion, Noble Lion (Mount) Obtained by taming a Noble Lion. By mastering the secrets of Lion's Rock, you proved yourself worthy to face the mighty lions there. One of them even chose to accompany you.
Lovely Dots 1 3 Four-Leaf Clover, Ladybug, Ladybug (Mount) Obtained by taming a Ladybug. Finding a four-leaved clover is always a sign of luck. And as luck would have it, you even baited a lovely dotted ladybug. Lucky you!
Loyal Lad 1 1 Bag of Apple Slices, Incredibly Old Witch, Donkey Obtained by taming a Donkey. Having a loyal friend alongside is comforting to every adventurer. If only this lad was not so stubborn...
Lucky Horseshoe 1 1 Horse Station World Change, Sugar Oat, Music Box, Wild Horse, War Horse Obtained by taming a Wild Horse. 'Sweets for my steed' could be your motto. An impressive horse is eating out of your hand. Saddle up and be ready to find adventure, new friends, and maybe someone to shoe your horse now and then.
Luminous Kitty 1 3 The Lightbearer, Deed of Ownership, Santa Claus, Blazebringer Obtained by getting a very special present from Santa Claus. You made some efforts to bring a little more light into the world. And what a nice present you got in return!
Magnetised 1 2 Iron Loadstone, Music Box, Ironblight, Ironblight (Mount) Obtained by taming an Ironblight. This magnetic beast attracted you in a very literal way. Or was it attracted by your metal equipment? Anyway, you seem to be stuck together now.
Mind the Dog! 1 2 Shadows of Yalahar Quest, Golem Wrench, Modified Gnarlhound, Gnarlhound (Mount) Obtained by taming a Modified Gnarlhound. Barking dogs never bite, as the saying goes. But this one clearly tried. In the end, however, you were able to walk the dog - ahem, gnarlhound.
Out of the Stone Age 1 3 Maxilla Maximus, Undead Cavebear, Undead Cavebear (Mount) Obtained by taming an Undead Cavebear. What a blast from the past! This thankful patient thinks you missed your dentist vocation. It's now ready to take a bite of the future and to carry you to your next adventure, or your next patient.
Pecking Order 1 1 Carrot on a Stick, Terror Bird, Racing Bird Obtained by taming a Terror Bird. Ah, the old carrot-on-a-stick trick. Well done! You've made the racing bird accept you as a rider and provider. Just don't feed it your fingers.
Personal Nightmare 1 3 Nightmare Horn, Shock Head, Shock Head (Mount) Obtained by taming a Shock Head. It might come as a shock to you, but this is the mount of your dreams. Not exactly the white steed of Prince Charming, but maybe the ladies will still scream and faint at the sight of you.
Pig-Headed 1 2 Rottin Wood and the Married Men Quest, Hunting Horn, Boar, Rapid Boar Obtained by taming a Boar. Whoa, sow long! This boar is like a force of nature, breaking through the undergrowth of all the Tibian forests and all records of speed. Hang on!
Scales and Tail 1 2 Harness, Music Box, Draptor, Draptor (Mount) Obtained by taming a Draptor. The Muggy Plains are a dangerous place, often raided by dragons. But that was your luck: thus you found this scaly little guy.
Slugging Around 1 2 Belongings of a Deceased, Slug Drug, Slug, Tiger Slug Obtained by taming a Slug. Drugging a snail can have some beneficial side effects. You're now the proud owner of a snarling, speed-crazy slug. Maybe it'll purr if you stroke it. Anyway, life should be one slick ride from now on.
Spin-Off 1 1 Sweet Smelling Bait, Music Box, Wailing Widow, Widow Queen Obtained by taming a Wailing Widow. Seems like this spider has got a sweet tooth. As a result, eight hairy legs are now at your disposal to crawl and weave at your whim, and strike fear into the hearts of men.
Starless Night 1 3 Leather Whip, Music Box, Midnight Panther, Midnight Panther (Mount) Obtained by taming a Midnight Panther. By many it is considered a myth like the Yeti. But you came, saw and tamed it. Now you're the proud rider of a midnight panther, black as a starless night.
Stuntman 1 3 The Mage's Tower World Change, Golden Can of Oil, Uniwheel (Object), Uniwheel Obtained by taming a Uniwheel (Object). A drop of oil and you're good to go. This unique mount will roll merrily in and out of any strange place you want to visit. If you see no exit, you probably ended up in a circus ring. Ah well, the show must go on!
Swamp Beast 1 1 Leech, Water Buffalo, Water Buffalo (Mount) Obtained by taming a Water Buffalo. By cleverly using a leech to cool that raging bull's blood, you managed not to get swamped or trampled in a water buffalo stampede. The creature is now docile and follows your every command.
The Right Tone 1 1 Edala, Diapason, Crystal Wolf, Crystal Wolf (Mount) Obtained by taming a Crystal Wolf. By setting the right tone you convinced a crystal wolf to accompany you. Remember it is made of crystal, though, so be careful in a banshee's presence.
Thick-Skinned 1 2 Chondur, Stampor, Stampor (Mount) Obtained by obtaining a Stampor (Mount) from Chondur. It's unstoppable! Walls? Fortresses? Obstacles? Objections? Pah! Nothing will stand before the stampor. Arrows and spears bounce off its hide, enemies are trampled by the dozen. Just don't go for the subtle approach or a date on this thing.
Way to Hell 1 2 Glow Wine, Music Box, Magma Crawler, Magma Crawler (Mount) Obtained by taming a Magma Crawler. This fiery beast really tried to give you hell. But not even a magma crawler can resist a mug of spicy, hot glow wine. Skol!
Lost Palace Raider 1 2 Asura Palace Quest, The Lost Brother Quest Complete The Lost Brother Quest and the Asura Palace Quest. Lifting the secrets of a fabulous palace and defeating a beautiful demon princess was a thrilling experience indeed. This site's marvels nearly matched its terrors. Nearly.
Hoard of the Dragon 1 1 The Great Dragon Hunt Quest, Kha'zeel Dragon Lairs Complete The Great Dragon Hunt Quest 10 times. Your adventurous way through countless dragon lairs earned you a pretty treasure - and surely the enmity of many a dragon.
The More the Merrier 0 0 Recruiter Outfits Used to be obtainable by logging into the game after earning the full Recruiter Outfits. It's dangerous to go alone... Take ten friends.
Notorious Worldsaver 3 8 World Quests Participate in the A Piece of Cake, Annual Autumn Vintage, Bewitched, Demon's Lullaby, Rise of Devovorga, The Colours of Magic, and The Lightbearer World Quests. You're in the front line when it comes to saving your world or taking part in social events. Whether you do it noticed or unnoticed by the people, your world can rely on you to dutifully do your part to make it a better place for everyone.
Hat Hunter 2 5 Ferumbras, Ferumbras' Hat Complete the Ferumbras' Ascension Quest. You sucessfully fought against all odds to protect your world from an ascending god! – You weren't there for the hat only after all?
Rift Warrior 1 3 Rift Warrior Outfits, Ferumbras' Ascension Quest Complete the Rift Warrior Outfits Quest. You went through hell. Seven times. You defeated the demons. Countless times. You put an end to Ferumbras claims to ascendancy. Once and for all.
The Call of the Wild 1 2 Krailos, Ogres, Clomps Complete the entirety of the Krailos Quest. Note: In order to get this achievement you need all seven mission completed in your quest log at the same time. Since taking on Grubokk's mission deletes the one the goblins give you, you are advised to do Grubokk's one first. You opposed man-eating ogres and clumsy clomps. You grappled with hungry chieftains, desperate goblins and angry spirits. So you truly overcame the wild vastness of Krailos.
Ogre Chef 1 1 Krailos, Ogres Complete the The Chieftain's Menu mission of the Krailos Quest 3 times. You didn't manage to become an ogre chief. But at least you are, beyond doubt, a worthy ogre chef.
Ender of the End 2 5 Otherworld Complete the Heart of Destruction Quest. You have entered the heart of destruction and valiantly defeated the world devourer. By your actions you have postponed the end of the world — at least for a while.
Vortex Tamer 2 5 Otherworld Obtained by taming the following:
  • a Sparkion by using a Vibrant Egg ,
  • a Neon Sparkid , by using a Crackling Egg ,
  • a Vortexion by using a Menacing Egg .

This is arguably the most expensive Achievement in Tibia, as purchasing all three Eggs can easily exceed a total cost of 2,500,000,000.

After a long journey and dedication you were favoured by fortune and have tamed all three elusive beasts of the vortex. Unless the Vortexion decides you're a tasty morsel you can enjoy your small stable of ravaging beasts from beyond.
Cold as Ice 2 6 Ice Cube, Obsidian Knife, Ice Mammoth, Ice Sculptor Obtainable by sculpting 10 Ice Mammoths from Ice Cubes by using an Obsidian Knife on them. Take an ice cube and an obsidian knife and you'll very likely shape something really pretty from it. Mostly cute little mammoths, which are a hit with all the girls.
Rhino Rider 1 1 Forgotten Knowledge Quest, Astral Shaper Rune Obtained by taming a Stone Rhino. Don't forget, even your rhino sometimes needs a hug. A careful one in this case.
Forbidden Fruit (Achievement) 1 1 Forgotten Knowledge Quest, Thorn Knight Obtained by eating a Forbidden Fruit. You could not resist the taste of the forbidden fruit. Since you don't feel changed at all, it couldn't have been that bad after all. Or could it?
Treasure Hunter 1 3 Dragon Chest, First Dragon Quest, Valuables Obtained by opening all 20 Dragon Chests during the First Dragon Quest. You wandered the world of Tibia in search of the ancient dragons' hoards. You are sure, you found them all.
Reason to Celebrate 1 1 Festive Outfits, First Dragon Quest Obtained by attaining the full version of the Festive Outfits. You met the legendary First Dragon and survived. That's a reason to celebrate for sure.
Heartbreaker 1 1 Marriage While married, say marriage to one of the Marriage Officiant NPCs and tell them that your heart belongs to someone other than your marriage partner five times. Trust? Love? Faithfulness? Pah! Antiquated sentiments. As long as you have fun, you do not mind stepping on lots of hearts. Preferably while wearing combat boots.
Forbidden Knowledge 1 1 Forgotten Knowledge Quest, The Last Lore Keeper Obtained by using a Key to Knowledge on the Forbidden Tome, both of which will be consumed; this won't work if you have never eaten a Forbidden Fruit. Perhaps with so much acquired knowledge, never meant for you, you know even when to stop! Time will tell whether this knowledge will do more harm or good.
Toothfairy Assistant 1 1 Threatened Dreams Quest Obtainable by finishing the Tooth Fairy part of the Threatened Dreams Quest and then delivering all the teeth requested by the same NPC. You assisted a very prominent fae and you fought tooth and nail to earn this title.
Corruption Contained 2 5 Cults of Tibia Quest Obtainable by finishing the Cults of Tibia Quest. You have managed to stall the worst incursion of corruption. Still this is just one battle won in an all out war for your world.
Fairy Teasing 1 1 Feyrist, Dancing Fairy (Object), Sparkles. Use a total of 100 usable Small Plant Houses (This is my house! Back off!) and Dancing Fairies (Doooon't touch me! *puff*). Teasing fairies is fun. They leave behind such pretty clouds of glittering dust when chased. Just hope they don't get you back for it.
Biodegradable 1 1 Shimmer Swimmer, Twisted Waters World Change, Lake Equivocolao Obtainable by fishing 50 Shimmer Swimmers. You caught fifty rare shimmer swimmers. Getting rid of all those corpses by dumping them into the lake really was worth it, wasn't it? Wait, didn't something move in the water just now...?
Contender 1 3 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 10 medium monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 10 medium monsters in the cyclopedia.
Hunting Permit 1 1 Cyclopedia Obtainable by fully unlocking any monster in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked your very first monster in the cyclopedia.
Little Adventure 1 1 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 10 easy monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 10 easy monsters in the cyclopedia.
Skilled Hunter 2 5 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 10 hard monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 10 hard monsters in the cyclopedia.
Pyromaniac 2 4 Bewitched, Dry Piece of Wood Obtainable by using 500 Dry Pieces of Wood on the slide of the Bewitched event. Love ... fire! So ... shiny! Must ... buuuurrrn!
Over the Moon 2 5 Grimvale Quest Obtained by finishing the missions The Curse of the Full Moon and The Curse Spreads of the Grimvale Quest. The Curse of the Full Moon transforms harmless citizens into feral beasts. But with your help, Edron and Cormaya are safe - fairly.
Death in the Depths 1 2 Dangerous Depths Quest Obtained by destroying all 3 lava pumps after defeating the bosses of Warzone 4, Warzone 5 and Warzone 6. The Baron from Below, Duke of the Depths and the Count of the Core are no more!
Buried the Baron 1 1 Dangerous Depths Quest Obtainable by using the lava pump in the room reached after defeating The Baron From Below in the Dangerous Depths Quest. You defeated the Baron from Below and destroyed his lava pump!
Duked It Out 1 1 Dangerous Depths Quest Obtainable by using the lava pump in the room reached after defeating The Duke Of The Depths in the Dangerous Depths Quest. You defeated the Duke of the Depths and destroyed his lava pump!
His Days are Counted 1 1 Dangerous Depths Quest Obtainable by using the lava pump in the room reached after defeating The Count Of The Core in the Dangerous Depths Quest. You defeated the Count of the Core and destroyed his lava pump!
Scourge of Scarabs 1 3 Dangerous Depths Quest Obtainable by opening a chest in one of the reward rooms after defeating the Ancient Spawn of Morgathla (Dangerous Depths Quest). You took the heat and defeated the Ancient Spawn of Morgathla!
Up the Molehill 1 3 Candle Stump, Mole, Mole (Mount) Obtained by taming a Mole. Putting this candle stump on your new mount was kind of a waiting game. You're even tempted to call it whack-a-mole. But in the end you found a loyal companion for your journeys into the depths.
Cobbled and Patched 2 6 Makeshift Warrior Outfits, Plan for a Makeshift Armour, Crude Wood Planks, Tinged Pot Obtainable by getting both addons of Makeshift Warrior Outfits. Exploring the depths of Tibia can be a dangerous task. Surprisingly, some crude wood planks, rusty nails and a tinged pot can offer a sufficient protection against the creatures lurking in the deep.
Little Big Adventure 1 2 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 100 easy monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 100 easy monsters in the cyclopedia.
Serious Contender 2 4 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 100 medium monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 100 medium monsters in the cyclopedia.
Millennial Falcon 1 3 The Secret Library Quest, Grand Master Oberon. Obtained by defeating Grand Master Oberon during The Secret Library Quest. You defeated Grand Master Oberon and the remnants of the Order of the Falcon, no matter the odds.
Spectulation 1 1 The Secret Library Quest, Grand Master Oberon. Obtained by entering the Sunken Temple north-west of Banuta. You checked out a strange temple deep in the jungles of Tiquanda. Spectulus was right, it was indeed overrun by strange fish-men you now call Deathlings.
Battle Mage 2 6 Battle Mage Outfits, The Secret Library Quest. Obtainable by receiving the Battle Mage Outfits. Wielding dangerous knowledge as well as the sword is your expertise. You have proven yourself versatile in all manner of situations.
Trip to the Beach 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Quirefang as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Braving a hive full of unimaginable proportions and its grotesque creatures on the surface is only one side of Gray Beach. Your full trip of the island also included a dive into the black nothingness of the deep sea, facing the wrath of the Njey.
All Hail the King 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Thais (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Old temples, a meadowy countryside and the splendour of Thais - you really know every corner of King Tibianus' realm now.
The Ogre Steppe 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Krailos as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. A vast steppe, voracious ogres and dried out salt seas - you really know every corner of Krailos now.
Realms of Dreams 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Feyrist as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Lush meadows, colourful fairies and sentient stones - you really know every corner of Feyrist now.
Jewel in the Swamp 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Venore (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Damp swamps, a dry desert and the opulence of Venore - you really know every corner of Eastern Mainland now.
Long Live the Queen 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Carlin (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Ancient battlefields, amazons and the glory of Carlin - you really know every corner of Queen Eloise's realm now.
Dwarven Mines (Achievement) 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Kazordoon (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Vast mines, an orc fortress and the magnificence of Kazordoon - you really know every corner of North-Eastern Mainland now.
Elven Woods 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Ab'Dendriel (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Tall trees, deep forests and and the beauty of Ab'Dendriel - you really know every corner of the elven lands now.
Bibliomaniac 1 3 Flying Book, Library Ticket Obtained by taming a Flying Book. You passion for reading was somewhat diminished by biting books and aggressive quills. But this flying specimen proved to be a loyal companion. Never judge a book by its cover!
Ancient Splendor 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Yalahar (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You've braved the perils of Yalahar and learned of its gloomy shadows of long gone greatness.
Glooth Punk 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Oramond (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Glooth is the substance that powers a whole continent and all its weird inhabitants, workshops and factories. You travelled this strange smorgasbord of curiosities in its entirety - just in time for tea.
Daraman's Footsteps 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Northern Darama (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You journeyed through Darashia and the sea of sand around it, while fighting the perils of the desert.
King of the Jungle 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Tiquanda as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You have searched Port Hope and the jungle that thoroughly, that you are up to adoption by a friendly ape family.
Liberty Bay Watch 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Vandura as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. A pirate's haven and a burglar's hideout. You found your way around Liberty Bay and its surroundings - land, ho!
Lizard Kingdom 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Zao as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. From the southern steppe through the Dragonblaze Mountains and the Muggy Plains to the forbidden city of Razachai - you really know every corner of Zao now.
Mummy's Dearest 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Southern Darama as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You have combed the desert and searched the pyramid city of Ankrahmun.
Race to the Pole 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Hrodmir as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. You have expelled the fog of the unknown from the islands of Svargrond. Maybe not as first, but that's not what matters in the end.
Stronghold of Edron 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map Obtained by completely discovering Edron (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Strong fortresses, sprawling woods and ivory towers - you really know every corner of Edron now.
Twisted Dreams 1 1 Measuring Tibia Quest, Cyclopedia#Map. Obtained by completely discovering Roshamuul (including its surroundings) as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. A journey through a dreamscape of evil is no small feat. Yet you traversed the nightmarish lands of Roshamuul and live to tell the tale. Don't fall asleep now...
Widely Travelled 3 7 Outfits, Discoverer Outfits, Measuring Tibia Quest. Obtainable by getting the basic Discoverer Outfits. As a true globetrotter you can now show your colours proudly with this extraordinary outfit.
Library Liberator 1 3 The Secret Library Quest Obtainable upon killing The Scourge of Oblivion. Though you couldn't prevent the theft of the godbreaker knowledge, you still managed to fight off the invasion of the library and to kill the scourge of oblivion, a powerful servant of the enemy.
Master Debater 1 1 The Secret Library Quest. Obtained by getting all books of The Grand Master of Verbal Debate and by defeating Grand Master Oberon during The Secret Library Quest. You truly are the grand master of verbal debate! Now going forth and putting this wisdom to good use in everyday life... is probably debatable.
Running the Rift 1 3 Rift Runner Obtainable by using a Mysterious Scroll and receiving the Rift Runner mount. You don't just have a permission to ride a rift runner, you literally went through hell and earned it!
Exalted Battle Mage 1 2 Battle Mage Outfits, The Secret Library Quest. Obtainable by getting both addons of Battle Mage Outfits. Not only did you master the battlefield as a mage, you were also induced to the most inner secrets of the art of magical warfare and prevailed.
High and Dry 1 2 The Secret Library Quest Obtainable by shipwrecking 30 times after asking for a shortcut to captain Charles (you must wait 20 hours to ask for a shortcut again after shipwrecking). You asked Captain Charles to take a shortcut quite a few times. Now you are all too familiar with desert islands all over Tibia.
Areas of Effect 1 3 Cyclopedia#Map, Spawn Obtainable by donating a total of 1 million gold to improve the spawn rate of one or more areas. Wisely contributing your resources to areas, you pushed creatures to maximum effect, allowing improved respawn for everyone! Well done!
Dream Warrior 2 6 The Dream Courts Quest Obtainable by receiving both addons of the Dream Warrior Outfits. You became an acquaintance of the courts of dreams and acquired the right to display your new status and title of 'dream warrior'.
Keeper of the 7 Keys 1 2 The Dream Courts Quest Obtainable by solving all 7 key puzzles of The Dream Courts Quest. You found the Seven Keys to unlock ... no, not the seven seas. But at least seven doors in the realm of dreams.
Lacewing Catcher 1 3 Lacewing Moth, Turquoise Tendril Lantern Obtained by taming a Lacewing Moth. You caught a lacewing moth with your lantern. It will follow you in companionship as the bearer of the lantern will be its guide through the darkness now.
Tied the Knot 1 1 The Dream Courts Quest Obtainable by finding all spell words during the Haunted House mission of The Dream Courts Quest. You figured out the right order of spells in the buried cathedral, how enchanting!
Moth Whisperer 1 3 Hibernal Moth, Purple Tendril Lantern Obtained by taming a Hibernal Moth. Your lantern was too bewitching for a hibernal moth. It couldn't withstand and follows you, the bearer of the lantern, now.
Dream Catcher (Achievement) 1 3 The Dream Courts Quest, Dream Catcher Obtainable by killing The Nightmare Beast and then reporting to Undal or Vanys. You are the slayer of the ancient nightmare beast and prevented the nightmare to spread its madness.
No Horse Open Sleigh 1 3 Winterlight Solstice Obtainable by receiving a Bright Percht Sleigh, a Cold Percht Sleigh or a Dark Percht Sleigh.

Note: You can obtain the 3 different Sleighs, but there is only one achievement given for the first one you chose.

This sleigh is not driven by magic but pushed by a percht. Hopefully you two get along well together...!
Raider in the Dark 2 6 Winterlight Solstice Obtained by receiving the full Percht Raider Outfits. But can you truly be one of them?
Champion of Winter 1 2 The Dream Courts Quest Obtainable by killing 20 bosses at the Dream Scar as part of The Dream Courts Quest when fighting for the Winter Dreamelves. You have vanquished numerous arena champions in the name of the Winter Court.
Champion of Summer 1 2 The Dream Courts Quest Obtainable by killing 20 bosses at the Dream Scar as part of The Dream Courts Quest when fighting for the Summer Dreamelves. You have vanquished numerous arena champions in the name of the Summer Court.
Bewitcher 2 5 Bewitched Obtainable by reaching 750 favour points during the Bewitched event. You literally put everything in that cauldron except lilac and gooseberries.
Sun and Sea 2 5 Obtainable by completing the first 5 missions of Kilmaresh Quest. You made sure that the balance of sun and sea is preserved in Kilmaresh. The Golden City of Issavi won't forget your favour.
Gryphon Rider 1 3 Obtainable by taming a Gryphon. Unmasking spies, killing demons, discovering omens, solving puzzles and fighting ogres, manticores and feral sphinxes. - Nobody said it was easy to become a gryphon rider.
A Study in Scarlett 1 3 Cobra Bastion, Grave Danger Quest Obtainable by defeating Scarlett Etzel You ended the regn of Scarlett Etzel. All-seeing yet blind, ever powerful yet ultimately helpless, she never got a second chance to truly see. Or has she...
The Empire's Glory 1 1 Obtainable by discovering Kilmaresh as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Mythical creatures, forgotten catacombs and the Golden City - you really know every corner of Kilmaresh now.
Hippofoddermus 1 1 Reed Balls, Hippo. Obtainable by feeding 100 Hippos with Reed Balls around Kilmaresh. You did the hippo population of Kilmaresh a great favour. A well-fed hippo is a happy hippo.
Inquisition's Hand 1 3 Grave Danger Quest, King Zelos Obtainable by finishing the Grave Danger Quest. You defeated the Lich Knights and became the hand of the Inquisition, allowed to wear their special garb.
Master Hunter 2 6 Cyclopedia Obtainable by unlocking 100 hard monsters in the Cyclopedia. You have fully unlocked 100 hard monsters in the cyclopedia.
Sculptor Apprentice 1 2 Alyxo, Kilmaresh Quest Obtainable by delivering a Small Tortoise, a Bat (Item), a Scorpion (Item), a Scared Frog, and a Calamary (Item) to Alyxo. Granted, you didn't carve those lifelike animal figurines yourself. But helping a medusa to find proper objects and even watching her using her petrifying gaze is almost as rewarding.
Avid Spectral Reader 1 1 Cobra Bastion, Scarlett Etzel, Grand Master Oberon Obtainable by using The Spatial Warp Almanac while inside Gaffir's secret room accessed through the Cobra Bastion. What draws things to other dimensions, one wonders. You read the almanac at just the right spot to end up... where, of all places? That is the problem with dimensional travel: you will never know. Or you have always known. And everything in between.
Inquisition's Arm 1 2 Grave Danger Quest, King Zelos, Hand of the Inquisition Outfits Quest Obtainable by getting both addons of the Hand of the Inquisition Outfits. Your special garb, solely awarded to a dedicated Hand of the Inquisition, is now complete.
Traditionalist 2 6 Orcsoberfest Obtainable by receiving both addons of the Orcsoberfest Garb Outfits. You proudly wear the traditional Orcsoberfest garb, same as it ever was and as it always will be.
Do a Barrel Roll! 1 3 Orcsoberfest Obtainable by receiving a Blue Rolling Barrel, Green Rolling Barrel or a Red Rolling Barrel. Note: You can obtain the 3 different Barrels, but there is only one achievement given for the first one you chose. Riding a traditional beer barrel from the Orcsoberfest is a once-in-a-lifetime experience. Beer sold separately.
Orcsoberfest Welcome 1 3 Orcsoberfest Obtainable by winning on every game in the Orcsoberfest, and also defeating The Great Schnitzel and King Chuck. The Orcsoberfest is not only known for its traditional food, beer and customs but also fun events and excitement! You took part in all of that and can now truly say: "I survived!"
Prospectre 1 1 The Thaian, Feaster of Souls Quest Obtainable by defeating The Thaian during the Feaster of Souls Quest. You made acquaintance with the Thaian. A strange contemporary with a dark history. No man but a derivate of greed and obsession.
Beyonder 1 3 Feaster of Souls Quest, The Pale Worm Obtainable by completing the Feaster of Souls Quest. Adventurous beyond death, you travelled the Netherworld. Although you had just the ghost of a chance you survived and even came back from the realm of the dead.
Falconer 1 2 Task Board, Falconer Outfits Obtainable by getting the full Falconer Outfits. A true beastmaster learns the language of his animal companions. Now you as well can bolster your unique bond with nature and help preserve the balance of life as a proud falconer.
Steppe Elegance 1 3 Task Board, Antelope Obtainable by getting the Antelope mount. Champion of the wildlands, a swift strider among the creatures of the wild. The elegant nature of the gallop, this envoy of speed has mastered, indicates the precise understanding of its terrain and environment.
Nothing but Hot Air 1 3 Feaster of Souls Quest Obtainable by getting the Haze mount. You have tamed the ghostly mists to do your bidding. For now ...
Verminbane 1 1 Task Board Obtainable by completing 100 Beginner Weekly Kill Tasks. And so it begins!
Monsterhunter 1 2 Task Board Obtainable by completing 200 Adept Weekly Kill Tasks. Fear me, monsters! There is some more slaying to come!
Taskmaster 1 3 Task Board Obtainable by completing 500 Expert/Master Weekly Kill Tasks. Having hunted and bested them all, you live for the thrill of the hunt!
Mainstreet Nightmare 1 2 Feaster of Souls Quest, Poltergeist Outfits Quest Obtainable by getting the full Poltergeist Outfits. Now you are able to wander around Tibia wearing an angst-inducing vestment.
The Snowman 1 1 Christmas, Grynch Clan Goblin Obtainable by opening 100 Snowman Packages or Furniture Kits containing Snowmen. You love the winter. Fully equipped with scarf and gloves, you like to have fun outside while building lots of snowmen with your friends. Snowball fight, anyone?
Drama in Darama 1 3 Hyaena Lair, Lion Sanctum Obtained by finishing the An Ancient Feud mission of the Grimvale Quest. If a pride of lions and a pack of hyaenas feud, it is not called a catfight but a ... whatsoever. For sure, it caused a lot of drama in the Darama Desert.
Unleash the Beast 3 8 Goshnar Obtained by getting both addons of Revenant Outfits. You defeated the manifestation of Goshnar's evil traits by fighting your way through beasts you didn't even want to imagine. It transformed you and now you can also look the part.
Lionheart 1 3 Order of the Lion Obtained by finishing the The Order of the Lion Quest. You bested the maleficent duo Drume and Fugue and restored order to the besieged town of Bounac. You conquered the exotic stronghold of the Order of the Cobra and bested the undead knights of the Order of the Falcon. A true knight in heart and mind.
You Got Horse Power 3 8 Soul War Quest Obtained by getting the Phantasmal Jade mount. Brought back to the realm of the living this magnificent creature will carry you through death and everything that lays beyond.
Malefitz 1 1 The Order of the Lion Quest Obtainable by delivering Fitzwilliam's Special Reserve to Fitzmaurice. Made acquaintance with three brothers Fitz.
Well Roared, Lion! 1 1 Grimvale Quest, Lion Sanctum Obtained by taming a White Lion You helped Domizian and thus proved yourself worthy to enter the werelion sanctum underneath Lion's Rock. You faced the mighty werelions there and one of the rare white lions even chose to accompany you.
Fearless 1 1 Horestis, Ornate Canopic Jar, The Mummy's Curse World Change Obtainable by breaking 50 Ornate Canopic Jars during The Mummy's Curse World Change event. You broke the jar of Horestis - fifty times. Either you know no fear or simply ignore it. Whatever the case, you are "fearless" indeed.
Honorary Rascoohan 1 2 A Pirate's Tail Quest, Ratmiral Blackwhiskers Obtained by getting both addons of Rascoohan Outfits. When in Rascacoon, do as the Rascoohans do!
Release the Kraken 1 3 Krakoloss Obtained by getting the Krakoloss mount. Riding around on this squishy companion gives you the feeling of flying through the air... uhm... swimming through the seven seas!
Pied Piper 1 3 Eustacio Obtained by greeting Eustacio after getting 5000 points with him during the A Pirate's Tail Quest. You are not exactly the Pied Piper of Hamelin but at least you managed to fend off a decent amount of pirats and helped to keep them out of the cities.
Transmutator 2 5 Yalahar, Alchemist Quarter, Creature Products Obtainable after transmuting into all 22 possible creatures on the Alchemist Quarter's Transmutator, here. You, Sir or Lady, are a true alchemist. Conducting transmutating experiments to find every possible combination has been your secret passion since years and the results of your research are incredible. Science has just taken a leap thanks to you!
Woodcarver 1 3 The Order of the Lion Quest, Kesar the Younger, Bounac Obtained by defeating Megasylvan Yselda during the Adventures of Galthen Quest. You defeated Megasylvan Yselda in the wake of the sleeping carnisylvan menace deep under Bounac.
Knowledge Raider (Achievement) 1 3 Too Hot to Handle Quest Obtained by completing 50 consecutive tasks of the Too Hot to Handle Quest. Your thirst for knowledge is insatiable. In the task of helping your gnomish friends, flawless execution is just the icing on the cake.
Citizen of Issavi 1 2 Kilmaresh Quest, Citizen of Issavi Outfits Quest Obtained by getting both addons of the Citizen of Issavi Outfits. It was not the first time that you helped the Sapphire Blade or the Midnight Flame with a difficult task. You may now wear the Kilmareshian robes as well as the tagralt blade and the eye-embroidered veil of the seers as a sign of Issavi's gratitude.
Hot on the Trail 1 3 The Abomination Obtained by getting the Singeing Steed mount. Since it is fireproof, this flaming creature feels right at home in raging infernos. But remember: just because it doesn't burn, you still do!
King's Council 1 2 Bounac, Kesar the Younger Obtained by getting both addons of the Royal Bounacean Advisor Outfits. Your continued efforts in keeping Bounac and the people of Kesar the Younger safe, earned you a permanent place at the royal court as an advisor to the king.
Phantastic! 1 3 Tibiadrome Obtained by getting the Phant mount. This mighty pachyderm will march into battle as if just taking its Sunday stroll. The cost of friendship was only a few drome points!
Shell We Take a Ride 1 3 Too Hot to Handle Quest, Eldritch Crystal Obtained by getting the Shellodon mount. Equipped with the shell of a tortoise and claws of a lobster this insect like companion will help you through every hardship.
Bounacean Chivalry 1 2 Bounac, Kesar the Younger Obtained by using the Violet Tulip Kesar gave you next to Yselda after defeating Megasylvan Yselda while keeping her Megasylvan Saplings alive. Yselda forever stands watch against the carnisylvan menace. Ever awake, waiting in the dark, her heart longs to be united with her king once again. Deep empathy let a hero to bring her Kesar's tulip as a token of his love. That hero was you.
Some Like It Hot 1 2 The Brainstealer Obtained by completing the Too Hot to Handle Quest. You have braved the searing heat in the tunnels deep below Kazordoon and vanquished the Brainstealer. The voices inside your head are finally silenced.
Unlikely Pathfinder 1 2 The Hidden City of Beregar Quest Obtained by travelling from Beregar to Kazordoon through the Wagon Maze. Wow - what was that? You don't know how you ended up here, but somehow you did. How to get from Beregar to Kazordoon in a jiffy - that's something those dwarves would love to know, but you're not quite sure how to reproduce it.
First Achievement 1 1 25 Years of Tibia Quest Obtained by painting a picture of the Colossus Fortress during the 25 Years of Tibia Quest. Congratulations to your very first achievement! ... Well, not really. But imagine, it is. Because at this point during your journey into Tibia's past, achievements have been introduced.
Engine Driver 1 3 25 Years of Tibia Quest Obtained by getting the Gloothomotive mount. This glooth-driven locomotive will bring you to any party in the blink of an eye.
Sharp Dressed 1 2 25 Years of Tibia Quest Obtained by getting both addons of the Formal Dress Outfits. Just everyone will be crazy about you if you are wearing this formal dress. They will come running, promise!
Royalty of Hazard 1 1 Primal Ordeal Quest, Gnomprona Obtained by defeating The Primal Menace at hazard level 11. For some it can't be hazardous enough.
Measuring the World 1 2 Measuring Tibia Quest Obtained by getting the second addon of the Discoverer Outfits. Step by step you discovered many of the secrets hidden in the world, thus gaining the right to wear the Discoverer outfit and hat. Made-to-measure for a brave traveller of the Tibian wilds.
Snake Pit 1 1 Within the Tides Quest Obtained by completely discovering Marapur as part of the Measuring Tibia Quest. Mysterious nagas, a vibrant jungle and a sinking island - you really know every corner of Marapur now.
Beaver Away 1 1 Within the Tides Quest Obtained by taming a Giant Beaver. You really were as busy as a beaver in order to help the nagas. Enjoy some eager company!
Wedding Planner 1 3 Marapur Obtained by completing the Star-Crossed Lovers of the Within the Tides Quest. Alas! What could be more beautiful and satisfying than bringing two loving hearts together? So romantic!
Friendly Fire 1 2 Primal Ordeal Quest, Fire-Fighter Outfits Quest Obtained by getting the complete Fire-Fighter Outfits. You mastered the fire and tamed a supervulcano!
Ripp-Ripp Hooray! 1 3 Primal Ordeal Quest Obtained by getting the Ripptor mount. Don't get carried away by your success. Get carried away by your ripptor.
Mutagenius 1 2 The Cradle of Monsters Quest Obtained by completing the mutagen task of The Cradle of Monsters Quest while having all 16 mutagens in the same colour. You accomplished the impossible and created 16 mutagens of corresponding colours
Warrior of the Iks 1 2 Adventures of Galthen Quest Obtained by receiving both addons of the Ancient Aucar Outfits. Combining unabating courage in combat and respect for the traditions and culture of the ancient Iks earned you the honours of true Aucar.
Strangest Thing 1 3 The Cradle of Monsters Quest Obtained by getting the Mutated Abomination mount. Only its rider can love this abomination of a mount.
Fully Decayed 1 2 Rotten Blood Quest Obtained by getting both addons of the Decaying Defender Outfits. You defeated the embodiments of decay and live to tell the tale, wear the rotting attire of the unfaltering defender proudly.
Like Fox and Mouse 1 3 Grimvale Quest - Paradise Lost Obtained by taming a Foxmouse. Sly as a fox, quiet as a mouse - the perfect mount for a stealthy foray.
The Spirit of Purity 1 3 Rotten Blood Quest Obtained by taming a Spirit of Purity. Withstanding both filth and desolation of the rotten darkness that corrupted the very core of this world, you embodied the weapon of purity and light to defy all that was tainted. This spirit will continue guide you on all future paths.
Museum Goer 1 2 Adventures of Galthen Quest - Mitmah Vanguard Obtained by defeating Mitmah Vanguard for the first time. You unveiled the secret plot of the Mitmah who stole away an entire civilisation for their own entertainment. Let the death of their outpost vanguard be an eternal lesson to them.
Mystic Predator 1 3 Jug of Gold Lye, Idol of Tukh, Polished Idol of Tukh, Mystic Jaguar Obtained by taming a Mystic Jaguar. Proving your true worth to a mystic creature like the jaguar, king of the hunt, granted you not only respect but also its heart.
The Rule of Raccool 1 2 Draccoon Herald Outfits, The Dragon Hoard Obtained by getting both addons of the Draccoon Herald Outfits. You almost feel as cool as a raccoon. Now, where's the trash?
Soul Mender 4 10 Soul War Quest, Goshnar's Taints Obtainable by killing Goshnar's Malice, Goshnar's Hatred, Goshnar's Spite, Goshnar's Cruelty, and Goshnar's Greed with 5 Goshnar's Taints. You were burdened with all this soul crushing negativity and still beat Malice, Hatred, Spite, Cruelty and Greed just to help one repentant soul. But as the saying goes: No soul is left behind!
The Rootwalker 1 2 Podzilla Quest Obtained by getting both addons of the Rootwalker Outfits. Traversing the innards of Podzilla was a conquest in and by itself, thanks to Two Lips you are now one with the plant biosphere as you stride its many intertwined trails.
I Wanna Fly Away 1 3 Threatened Dreams Quest - Sweet Dreams Obtained after using a Pegasus Feather, reward of the Threatened Dreams Quest - Sweet Dreams. ... on a pegasus, to a land of honey and milk. With this beautiful flying steed you certainly can.
A Friend in Need 1 2 Threatened Dreams Quest - Sweet Dreams Obtained after successfully freeing A Captive Forest Fury during the Threatened Dreams Quest - Sweet Dreams. You freed the captive forest fury from the Corym Black Market. A friend in need is a friend indeed!
Soul Crusher 1 2 Soulpit Obtained by unlocking Animus Mastery for at least one creature in each bestiary class in the Soulpit. The Soulpit resonates as the spirit of your final foe shatters under your might.
Smart Thinking 1 2 Winter 2010 Update - (8.70) Smart you indeed. The gods almost gave up hope that anyone would ever figure THAT one out. They smile on you proudly now.
Holzkopf 1 1 Demon Root Obtainable by using 100 Demon Roots. Things you do... for science.
Fiend Rider 1 3 Mounts, Primal Demonosaur Obtained by using a Demon in a Green Box and taming a Primal Demonosaur. Riding such an ancient beast is certainly a good and harmless idea.
Fiend Slayer 1 2 Outfits, Fiend Slayer Outfits Obtainable by getting both addons of Fiend Slayer Outfits. No living fiends were hurt to achieve this outfit.
Tear the Toxic Veil 3 7 No Rest for the Wicked Quest, Demonic Core Essence Obtainable by reaching rank 10 in the No Rest for the Wicked Quest (delivering 51,200 Demonic Core Essences). On the shoulders of demons, you tore through veils of venomous corruption. Demonic essences made you an unstoppable force but take care to also foster your human side.
Hell Rider 1 Mounts Pray it never finds its way back to its original stable with you still riding.
Alpha Rider 1 3 Mounts, Rotrender Obtained by using a Demon in a Golden Box and taming an Alpha Demonosaur. You never can tell, who's boss here.
Inner Peace 1 3 Transcendence Potion Obtainable by drinking 100 Transcendence Potions. The transcendence to a higher state of mind and existence in order to achieve inner peace has been amplified by various means throghout Medudri history. Among them a manifold of potions with varying potence - it seems some of them actually work...
Hope of the Merudri 1 2 The Way of the Monk Quest Obtained by touching all the ancient shrines in The Way of the Monk Quest. You followed the Three-Fold Path as did generations of Merudri before you. Carry the legacy, culture and hope of the Merudri proudly into this realm, the hearts of its people and beyond.
Umbral Redeemer 2 6 Umbral Creation, Umbral Katar Obtained by creating an Umbral Katar. You managed to create, improve and transform your katar into a master state and have proven yourself worthy in a nightmarish world.
Power of Words 2 5 Between the Lines Quest Obtained by completing the Between the Lines Quest. The pen is mightier than the sword. In a way, yes, you have had this experience. You have seen with your own eyes what the power of words can do, the written word, to be precise.
Illuminator 1 3 Between the Lines Quest, Illuminator Outfits. Obtained by getting both addons of the Illuminator Outfits. Joran and Yvette have brought the colours back to the world, and you have freed it from the monsters of this story. The world of books is now yours.
Bat Person 1 3 Bloody Tusks Quest - Gloom Maw (Mount) Obtained by completing the Bloody Tusks Quest. No matter your command, this beast is all ears!
Arsenal of War 3 7 The First of Many, A Well-Honed Arsenal, The Forbidden Build Obtainable by achieving Mastery in Weapon Proficiency on 50 different weapons. Feared by your enemies, admired by many - your reputation in weapon mastery precedes you.
The First of Many 1 3 Arsenal of War, A Well-Honed Arsenal, The Forbidden Build Obtainable by achieving Mastery in Weapon Proficiency on one weapon. The first step to greatness has been done.
A Well-Honed Arsenal 2 5 Arsenal of War, The First of Many, The Forbidden Build Obtainable by achieving Mastery in Weapon Proficiency on 10 different weapons. Your expertise in weaponry reaches new heights.
Achievement 563 ?
The Forbidden Build 1 3 The First of Many, A Well-Honed Arsenal, Arsenal of War Obtained by earning Mastery with certain 'useless' weapons.
Confirmed weapons are the following:
  • Club of the Fury
  • Glooth Blade
  • Glutton's Mace
  • Glooth Club
  • Ice Rapier
  • Incredible Mumpiz Slayer
  • Musician's Bow
  • Ornate Carving Rod
  • Ornate Mayhem Wand
  • Pointed Rabbitslayer
  • Small Stone
  • Snowball
 Surely, this will prove useful in the future... right?
Errand Runner 1 3 Obtainable by completing 100 Weekly Tasks (either delivery or creature killing tasks) on the Task Board. Your stash is cleared, your bestiary completed but the grind has only just begun.
Workhorse 2 5 Obtainable by completing 500 Weekly Tasks (either delivery or creature killing tasks) on the Task Board. Whether it's clearing cellars from rats or delivering quara eyes with a smile, you get the job done.
Taskaholic 3 You don't just read the bulletin board, you live on it.
Pest Control 3 7 Complete 10,000 Bounty Tasks. From rotworms in caves to dragons in the sky, no creature is safe from your overzealous swatting.
Bastard 2 5 The Order of the Stag Quest Obtained by finishing The Order of the Stag Quest. You freed the remnants of the Order of the Stag on the Isle of Ada from a warlock's yoke. An evil puppet master who lead many Stags against their own brethren. Eldoran the Ambitious, heir of Eldoran Etzel, Cadwgan's bastard son, is forever grateful.
Feral Trapper 1 2 Task Board, Feral Trapper Outfits Obtainable by completing the Feral Trapper Outfits. You've learned the way of the wilderness: its patience, its fury, its grace. As a feral trapper, you embody them all.
Razor's Edge 2 4 Defeat The Gravedigger while having 18, 19, or 20 stacks. Keep in mind that you die instantly when getting hit by the waves with 20 stacks. That has been a close call ...
Lost Letters 1 3 Obtainable by reading all personal letters from the Isle of Ada mini bosses. Many letters have been written by knights of the Order of the Stag. Some personal while others were simply a mistake. We often ask ourselves what happened to these once corresponding souls, we hope for the best but have to fear for the worst.
A reliable Friend 1 1 Obtainable by taming the Reliable Ram. The hungry ram devoured the whole bunch of turnips in a single bite, then looked at you as if it was ready for more. Make sure to keep it well fed along the way.
Castle Crasher 1 1 Obtainable by stepping on 10 Sand Castles on Aragonia. Somebody will be terribly sad about your actions! Imagine how much time it took to build all those castles ....
Stagmeister 1 1 Bottle of Enhanced Raubritter Lager Drink 20 Bottle of Enhanced Raubritter Lager. Modifying Brewmaster Bhaan's Raubritter Lager with a hint of Night Harpy, you received a potent remedy against their vicious attacks. Drinking so much of it however, you wonder what other side effects it has as you stare at the moon... mesmerised...
Mimic (Achievement) 1 1 Apparently not all chests are the same. Some have a life of their own and if you think about it... how do so many of them actually refill every day? Well, you're one step closer to revealing this secret
Echo Initiate 1 1 Obtained after triggering an Echo Raid for the first time You are quite curious about these echoes.
Echo Hunter 1 4 The echoes are beginning to infiltrate your dreams.
Echo Walker 2 Walking past an echo is no option. You're already addicted.
Six Steps Ahead 1 2 Skewered Fish Successfully taming a Jaracal. Swift and silent, the jaracal now runs at your side.
Radiant Nimbus 1 Cloud In a Bottle Obtained by taming a Radiant Nimbus (Mount). On top of a cloud, the sun is always shining.
Amati's Echo 2 4 Obtainable by finishing Shards of a Broken Moon Quest. You answered the call of the moon goddess and thwarted the asuri's plans. Yet the echoes will linger, and the whisper of the moonsilver is now a part of Marapur.
Enlightened, Indeed 1 You stared into the Light without blinking. Foolish or enlightened... who can tell?
Purrfectly Addicted 1 1 Obtained after using Catnip 100 times Psss psss psss ...
